forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 51. West wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 63, with temperatures falling to around 61 in the afternoon. West wind 7 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

weather_report:
Tonight's embrace in Downtown San Francisco is characterized by a gentle stirring of clouds against a cool backdrop, the temperature dipping comfortably to a cozy 51. As the sun rises on Wednesday, the scene unfolds and reveals a panorama brightened by genuine warmth, though it might not reach its peak until the afternoon, settling near 61. The breeze from the west will lend a brisk touch, playfully tousling your hair, while the occasional gust serves as a reminder of the spirited nature of the city. 

At this hour, a subtle marine layer may linger along the coastline, hinting at the fog that can often grace our skies, though it is expected to give way to clearer horizons as the day progresses. The pleasantness of the day invites leisurely ambulations through bustling neighborhoods or quiet moments at a local café. Layering up with a light jacket or cozy sweater will be ideal for navigating the cool morning air, just as a comfortable pair of shoes will prepare you for the adventures awaiting on the city’s hilly streets. Whether wandering through the historic streets or indulging in a quiet afternoon with a good read, there is an unmistakable charm in the air, encouraging you to savor the day ahead.
